# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE! THIS FILE IS AUTOMATICALLY GENERATED BY xml2cmake
CMAKE_MINIMUM_REQUIRED(VERSION 3.10 FATAL_ERROR)

PROJECT(openpmd_database LANGUAGES C CXX)

# Ensure installs stay under ~/.visit unless caller overrides the prefix.
if(CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX_INITIALIZED_TO_DEFAULT)
    set(CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX "$ENV{HOME}/.visit" CACHE PATH
        "Default install prefix for user-local VisIt plugins." FORCE)
endif()

SET(VISIT_PLUGIN_DIR "$ENV{HOME}/.visit/3.4.2/linux-x86_64/plugins" CACHE PATH
    "Directory where VisIt installs database plugins.")
SET(VISIT_PLUGIN_VS_INSTALL_FILE "/sw/andes/visit/3.4.2/linux-x86_64/include/PluginVsInstall.cmake"
    CACHE FILEPATH "Path to PluginVsInstall.cmake from the VisIt installation.")
GET_FILENAME_COMPONENT(VISIT_PLUGIN_INCLUDE_DIR "${VISIT_PLUGIN_VS_INSTALL_FILE}" DIRECTORY)
GET_FILENAME_COMPONENT(_VISIT_PLUGIN_INSTALL_PREFIX "${VISIT_PLUGIN_INCLUDE_DIR}" DIRECTORY)

option(OPENPMD_USE_VISIT_MPI
       "Use MPI libraries bundled with VisIt for openPMD-api."
       ON)
set(_OPENPMD_VISIT_MPI_AVAILABLE FALSE)
if(OPENPMD_USE_VISIT_MPI)
    set(_VISIT_MPI_INCLUDE_DIR
        "${_VISIT_PLUGIN_INSTALL_PREFIX}/include/mpich/include")
    set(_VISIT_MPI_LIBRARY_DIR "${_VISIT_PLUGIN_INSTALL_PREFIX}/lib")
    set(_VISIT_MPIEXEC "${_VISIT_PLUGIN_INSTALL_PREFIX}/bin/mpiexec")

    if(EXISTS "${_VISIT_MPI_INCLUDE_DIR}/mpi.h" AND
       EXISTS "${_VISIT_MPI_LIBRARY_DIR}/libmpi${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}")
        set(_OPENPMD_VISIT_MPI_AVAILABLE TRUE)
        set(MPI_ASSUME_NO_BUILTIN_MPI TRUE CACHE BOOL
            "Do not treat the base compiler as MPI-capable." FORCE)
        set(MPI_SKIP_COMPILER_WRAPPER TRUE CACHE BOOL
            "Use VisIt's bundled MPI paths instead of wrapper autodetection." FORCE)
        set(MPI_SKIP_GUESSING TRUE CACHE BOOL
            "Use VisIt's bundled MPI paths instead of fallback MPI guessing." FORCE)
        if(EXISTS "${_VISIT_MPIEXEC}")
            set(MPIEXEC_EXECUTABLE "${_VISIT_MPIEXEC}" CACHE FILEPATH
                "VisIt's bundled MPI launcher." FORCE)
        endif()

        foreach(_VISIT_MPI_LANG C CXX)
            unset(MPI_${_VISIT_MPI_LANG}_COMPILER CACHE)
            set(MPI_${_VISIT_MPI_LANG}_HEADER_DIR "${_VISIT_MPI_INCLUDE_DIR}"
                CACHE PATH "VisIt's bundled MPI include directory." FORCE)
            set(MPI_${_VISIT_MPI_LANG}_COMPILER_INCLUDE_DIRS "" CACHE STRING
                "MPI compiler wrapper include directories." FORCE)
        endforeach()
        set(MPI_C_ADDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS "${_VISIT_MPI_INCLUDE_DIR}"
            CACHE STRING "VisIt's bundled MPI C include directory." FORCE)
        set(MPI_CXX_ADDITIONAL_INCLUDE_DIRS "${_VISIT_MPI_INCLUDE_DIR}"
            CACHE STRING "VisIt's bundled MPI C++ include directory." FORCE)
        set(MPI_C_LIB_NAMES mpi pmpi CACHE STRING
            "VisIt's bundled MPI C libraries." FORCE)
        set(MPI_CXX_LIB_NAMES mpicxx mpi pmpi CACHE STRING
            "VisIt's bundled MPI C++ libraries." FORCE)
        set(MPI_mpi_LIBRARY
            "${_VISIT_MPI_LIBRARY_DIR}/libmpi${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}"
            CACHE FILEPATH "VisIt's bundled MPI library." FORCE)
        set(MPI_pmpi_LIBRARY
            "${_VISIT_MPI_LIBRARY_DIR}/libpmpi${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}"
            CACHE FILEPATH "VisIt's bundled PMPI library." FORCE)
        set(MPI_mpicxx_LIBRARY
            "${_VISIT_MPI_LIBRARY_DIR}/libmpicxx${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}"
            CACHE FILEPATH "VisIt's bundled MPI C++ library." FORCE)
    else()
        message(WARNING
            "OPENPMD_USE_VISIT_MPI is ON, but VisIt's bundled MPI was not "
            "found under ${_VISIT_PLUGIN_INSTALL_PREFIX}; FindMPI will use "
            "its normal search path.")
    endif()
endif()
SET(_VISIT_LIBRARY_DEPENDENCIES_FILE_DEFAULT
    "${VISIT_PLUGIN_INCLUDE_DIR}/VisItLibraryDependencies.cmake")
IF(NOT DEFINED VISIT_LIBRARY_DEPENDENCIES_FILE OR
   VISIT_LIBRARY_DEPENDENCIES_FILE STREQUAL "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/VisItLibraryDependencies.cmake")
    SET(VISIT_LIBRARY_DEPENDENCIES_FILE
        "${_VISIT_LIBRARY_DEPENDENCIES_FILE_DEFAULT}" CACHE FILEPATH
        "Path to VisIt's library dependency list for this plugin." FORCE)
ELSE()
    SET(VISIT_LIBRARY_DEPENDENCIES_FILE
        "${VISIT_LIBRARY_DEPENDENCIES_FILE}" CACHE FILEPATH
        "Path to VisIt's library dependency list for this plugin.")
ENDIF()
INCLUDE("${VISIT_PLUGIN_VS_INSTALL_FILE}")
INCLUDE("${VISIT_LIBRARY_DEPENDENCIES_FILE}")

IF(APPLE)
    # VisIt's macOS dylibs are installed as @rpath/lib/<name>.dylib, so the
    # plugin needs the VisIt runtime root, not VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR itself.
    GET_FILENAME_COMPONENT(VISIT_RUNTIME_DIR "${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}" DIRECTORY)
    IF(CMAKE_BUILD_RPATH)
        SET(CMAKE_BUILD_RPATH "${VISIT_RUNTIME_DIR};${CMAKE_BUILD_RPATH}")
    ELSE()
        SET(CMAKE_BUILD_RPATH "${VISIT_RUNTIME_DIR}")
    ENDIF()
    IF(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH)
        SET(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH "${VISIT_RUNTIME_DIR};${CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH}")
    ELSE()
        SET(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH "${VISIT_RUNTIME_DIR}")
    ENDIF()

    FUNCTION(NORMALIZE_VISIT_MACOS_DYLIB_DEPENDENCIES)
        GET_CMAKE_PROPERTY(_VISIT_CMAKE_VARIABLES VARIABLES)
        FOREACH(_VISIT_DEPENDS_VARIABLE IN LISTS _VISIT_CMAKE_VARIABLES)
            IF(_VISIT_DEPENDS_VARIABLE MATCHES "_LIB_DEPENDS$")
                SET(_NORMALIZED_VISIT_DEPENDS)
                FOREACH(_VISIT_DEPENDENCY IN LISTS ${_VISIT_DEPENDS_VARIABLE})
                    SET(_NORMALIZED_VISIT_DEPENDENCY "${_VISIT_DEPENDENCY}")
                    IF(_VISIT_DEPENDENCY MATCHES "^(vtk[A-Za-z0-9_]+)\\.([0-9][0-9.]+)$")
                        SET(_VISIT_DYLIB
                            "${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/lib${CMAKE_MATCH_1}-${CMAKE_MATCH_2}.dylib")
                        IF(EXISTS "${_VISIT_DYLIB}")
                            SET(_NORMALIZED_VISIT_DEPENDENCY "${_VISIT_DYLIB}")
                        ENDIF()
                    ENDIF()
                    LIST(APPEND _NORMALIZED_VISIT_DEPENDS
                        "${_NORMALIZED_VISIT_DEPENDENCY}")
                ENDFOREACH()
                SET(${_VISIT_DEPENDS_VARIABLE} "${_NORMALIZED_VISIT_DEPENDS}"
                    PARENT_SCOPE)
            ENDIF()
        ENDFOREACH()
    ENDFUNCTION()

    NORMALIZE_VISIT_MACOS_DYLIB_DEPENDENCIES()
ENDIF()

option(OPENPMD_DISABLE_STRUCTURED_BOUNDARY_CACHE
       "Skip building/caching structured boundary metadata for ghost synthesis"
       OFF)
if(OPENPMD_DISABLE_STRUCTURED_BOUNDARY_CACHE)
    add_compile_definitions(OPENPMD_DISABLE_STRUCTURED_BOUNDARY_CACHE)
endif()

SET(COMMON_SOURCES
openpmdPluginInfo.C
openpmdCommonPluginInfo.C
)

SET(LIBI_SOURCES
openpmdPluginInfo.C
)

SET(LIBM_SOURCES
openpmdMDServerPluginInfo.C
${COMMON_SOURCES}
avtopenpmdFileFormat.C
)

SET(LIBE_SOURCES
openpmdEnginePluginInfo.C
${COMMON_SOURCES}
avtopenpmdFileFormat.C
)

INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES(
${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}
${VISIT_DATABASE_INCLUDES}
)

LINK_DIRECTORIES(${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR})

# OpenPMD-api superbuild
set(openPMD_USE_PYTHON OFF CACHE BOOL "")
set(openPMD_BUILD_TESTING OFF CACHE BOOL "")
set(openPMD_BUILD_EXAMPLES OFF CACHE BOOL "")
set(openPMD_BUILD_CLI_TOOLS OFF CACHE BOOL "")
set(openPMD_BUILD_SHARED_LIBS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(openPMD_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "")
option(OPENPMD_USE_VISIT_ADIOS2
       "Use ADIOS2 libraries bundled with VisIt for openPMD-api."
       ON)
if(NOT DEFINED openPMD_USE_MPI OR openPMD_USE_MPI STREQUAL "AUTO")
    if(_OPENPMD_VISIT_MPI_AVAILABLE AND VISIT_PARALLEL)
        set(openPMD_USE_MPI ON CACHE STRING
            "MPI backend; enabled by default with VisIt's bundled MPI."
            FORCE)
    else()
        set(openPMD_USE_MPI OFF CACHE STRING
            "MPI backend; disabled by default when VisIt's bundled MPI is unavailable."
            FORCE)
    endif()
else()
    set(openPMD_USE_MPI "${openPMD_USE_MPI}" CACHE STRING
        "MPI backend; use OPENPMD_USE_VISIT_MPI=OFF to opt into external MPI discovery.")
endif()
set_property(CACHE openPMD_USE_MPI PROPERTY STRINGS ON TRUE AUTO OFF FALSE)
if(NOT DEFINED openPMD_USE_HDF5 OR openPMD_USE_HDF5 STREQUAL "AUTO")
    set(openPMD_USE_HDF5 OFF CACHE STRING
        "HDF5 backend (.h5 files); disabled by default to avoid conflicts with VisIt's imported HDF5 targets."
        FORCE)
else()
    set(openPMD_USE_HDF5 "${openPMD_USE_HDF5}" CACHE STRING
        "HDF5 backend (.h5 files); disabled by default to avoid conflicts with VisIt's imported HDF5 targets.")
endif()
set_property(CACHE openPMD_USE_HDF5 PROPERTY STRINGS ON TRUE AUTO OFF FALSE)
option(OPENPMD_USE_VISIT_HDF5
       "Use HDF5 libraries bundled with VisIt for openPMD-api."
       ON)
if(OPENPMD_USE_VISIT_HDF5 AND
   NOT openPMD_USE_HDF5 STREQUAL "OFF" AND
   NOT openPMD_USE_HDF5 STREQUAL "FALSE")
    set(openPMD_USE_HDF5 ON CACHE STRING
        "HDF5 backend (.h5 files)." FORCE)
    set_property(CACHE openPMD_USE_HDF5 PROPERTY STRINGS ON TRUE AUTO OFF FALSE)

    # Point cmake's own FindHDF5 at VisIt's HDF5 so it derives version and
    # parallel support from the actual headers.
    #
    # HDF5_ROOT restricts all find_program/find_path/find_library calls inside
    # FindHDF5 to NO_DEFAULT_PATH, preventing h5cc/h5pcc or a system HDF5
    # cmake config from being picked up instead.
    #
    # HDF5_C_INCLUDE_DIR must still be seeded explicitly because VisIt's headers
    # sit at include/hdf5/include/ rather than the standard include/ location
    # that HDF5_ROOT alone would reach.
    get_filename_component(_VISIT_INSTALL_PREFIX "${VISIT_ROOT_INCLUDE_DIR}" DIRECTORY)
    set(HDF5_ROOT "${_VISIT_INSTALL_PREFIX}" CACHE PATH
        "VisIt install prefix; restricts FindHDF5 to VisIt's HDF5." FORCE)
    set(HDF5_NO_FIND_PACKAGE_CONFIG_FILE TRUE CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
    set(HDF5_C_INCLUDE_DIR "${VISIT_ROOT_INCLUDE_DIR}/hdf5/include"
        CACHE PATH "VisIt bundled HDF5 include dir" FORCE)
endif()
if(OPENPMD_USE_VISIT_ADIOS2 AND
   NOT openPMD_USE_ADIOS2 STREQUAL "OFF" AND
   NOT openPMD_USE_ADIOS2 STREQUAL "FALSE")
    set(openPMD_USE_ADIOS2 ON CACHE STRING
        "ADIOS2 backend (.bp files)." FORCE)
    set_property(CACHE openPMD_USE_ADIOS2 PROPERTY STRINGS ON TRUE AUTO OFF FALSE)

    set(_VISIT_ADIOS2_SHIM_DIR
        "${openpmd_database_BINARY_DIR}/visit-adios2-cmake")
    file(MAKE_DIRECTORY "${_VISIT_ADIOS2_SHIM_DIR}")
    file(WRITE "${_VISIT_ADIOS2_SHIM_DIR}/adios2-config.cmake"
"set(ADIOS2_FOUND TRUE)
set(ADIOS2_VERSION 2.10.0)
set(ADIOS2_CXX_FOUND TRUE)
set(ADIOS2_MPI_FOUND TRUE)

set(_VISIT_ADIOS2_INCLUDE_DIR \"${VISIT_ROOT_INCLUDE_DIR}/adios2/include\")
set(_VISIT_ADIOS2_LIBRARY_DIR \"${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}\")
set(_VISIT_ADIOS2_LIBRARY_SUFFIX \"${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}\")

foreach(_adios2_component cxx11 cxx11_mpi cxx cxx_mpi)
  if(NOT TARGET adios2::\${_adios2_component})
    add_library(adios2::\${_adios2_component} SHARED IMPORTED)
  endif()
endforeach()

set_target_properties(adios2::cxx11 PROPERTIES
  IMPORTED_LOCATION \"${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_cxx11${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}\"
  INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES \"${VISIT_ROOT_INCLUDE_DIR}/adios2/include\"
  INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES \"${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_core${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX};${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_perfstubs${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}\")
set_target_properties(adios2::cxx11_mpi PROPERTIES
  IMPORTED_LOCATION \"${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_cxx11_mpi${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}\"
  INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES \"${VISIT_ROOT_INCLUDE_DIR}/adios2/include\"
  INTERFACE_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS \"ADIOS2_USE_MPI=1\"
  INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES \"${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_cxx11${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX};${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_core_mpi${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX};${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_core${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX};${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_perfstubs${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}\")
set_target_properties(adios2::cxx PROPERTIES
  IMPORTED_LOCATION \"${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_cxx11${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}\"
  INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES \"${VISIT_ROOT_INCLUDE_DIR}/adios2/include\"
  INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES \"${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_core${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX};${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_perfstubs${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}\")
set_target_properties(adios2::cxx_mpi PROPERTIES
  IMPORTED_LOCATION \"${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_cxx11_mpi${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}\"
  INTERFACE_INCLUDE_DIRECTORIES \"${VISIT_ROOT_INCLUDE_DIR}/adios2/include\"
  INTERFACE_COMPILE_DEFINITIONS \"ADIOS2_USE_MPI=1\"
  INTERFACE_LINK_LIBRARIES \"${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_cxx11${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX};${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_core_mpi${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX};${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_core${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX};${VISIT_LIBRARY_DIR}/libadios2_perfstubs${CMAKE_SHARED_LIBRARY_SUFFIX}\")
")
    file(WRITE "${_VISIT_ADIOS2_SHIM_DIR}/adios2-config-version.cmake"
"set(PACKAGE_VERSION 2.10.0)
if(PACKAGE_FIND_VERSION VERSION_GREATER PACKAGE_VERSION)
  set(PACKAGE_VERSION_COMPATIBLE FALSE)
else()
  set(PACKAGE_VERSION_COMPATIBLE TRUE)
  if(PACKAGE_FIND_VERSION VERSION_EQUAL PACKAGE_VERSION)
    set(PACKAGE_VERSION_EXACT TRUE)
  endif()
endif()
")
    set(ADIOS2_DIR "${_VISIT_ADIOS2_SHIM_DIR}" CACHE PATH
        "CMake package shim for VisIt's bundled ADIOS2." FORCE)
endif()
add_subdirectory(${openpmd_database_SOURCE_DIR}/extern/openPMD-api ${openpmd_database_BINARY_DIR}/openPMD-api)
include_directories(${OpenPMD_INCLUDE_DIRS_RET})

set(CPPTRACE_BUILD_TESTING OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(CPPTRACE_BUILD_TOOLS OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(CPPTRACE_BUILD_BENCHMARKING OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(CPPTRACE_BUILD_SHARED OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(CPPTRACE_GET_SYMBOLS_WITH_LIBDWARF OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(CPPTRACE_USE_EXTERNAL_LIBDWARF OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(CPPTRACE_USE_EXTERNAL_ZSTD OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(CPPTRACE_GET_SYMBOLS_WITH_ADDR2LINE ON CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
set(CPPTRACE_GET_SYMBOLS_WITH_NOTHING OFF CACHE BOOL "" FORCE)
add_subdirectory(${openpmd_database_SOURCE_DIR}/extern/cpptrace ${openpmd_database_BINARY_DIR}/cpptrace)

ADD_LIBRARY(IopenpmdDatabase ${LIBI_SOURCES})
TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(IopenpmdDatabase visitcommon)
SET(INSTALLTARGETS IopenpmdDatabase)

IF(NOT VISIT_ENGINE_ONLY AND NOT VISIT_DBIO_ONLY)
    ADD_LIBRARY(MopenpmdDatabase ${LIBM_SOURCES})
    TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(MopenpmdDatabase visitcommon avtdbatts avtdatabase_ser openPMD::openPMD cpptrace::cpptrace)
    ADD_TARGET_DEFINITIONS(MopenpmdDatabase MDSERVER)
    SET(INSTALLTARGETS ${INSTALLTARGETS} MopenpmdDatabase)
ENDIF(NOT VISIT_ENGINE_ONLY AND NOT VISIT_DBIO_ONLY)

ADD_LIBRARY(EopenpmdDatabase_ser ${LIBE_SOURCES})
TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(EopenpmdDatabase_ser visitcommon avtpipeline_ser avtdatabase_ser openPMD::openPMD cpptrace::cpptrace)
ADD_TARGET_DEFINITIONS(EopenpmdDatabase_ser ENGINE)
SET(INSTALLTARGETS ${INSTALLTARGETS} EopenpmdDatabase_ser)

IF(VISIT_PARALLEL)
    ADD_PARALLEL_LIBRARY(EopenpmdDatabase_par ${LIBE_SOURCES})
    TARGET_LINK_LIBRARIES(EopenpmdDatabase_par visitcommon avtpipeline_par avtdatabase_par openPMD::openPMD cpptrace::cpptrace)
    ADD_TARGET_DEFINITIONS(EopenpmdDatabase_par ENGINE)
    SET(INSTALLTARGETS ${INSTALLTARGETS} EopenpmdDatabase_par)
ENDIF(VISIT_PARALLEL)

IF(APPLE)
    FOREACH(_OPENPMD_PLUGIN_TARGET IN LISTS INSTALLTARGETS)
        ADD_CUSTOM_COMMAND(TARGET ${_OPENPMD_PLUGIN_TARGET} POST_BUILD
            COMMAND /usr/bin/codesign --force --sign -
                    "$<TARGET_FILE:${_OPENPMD_PLUGIN_TARGET}>"
            COMMENT "Ad-hoc signing ${_OPENPMD_PLUGIN_TARGET}")
    ENDFOREACH()
ENDIF()

VISIT_INSTALL_DATABASE_PLUGINS(${INSTALLTARGETS})
